name: SNAKE GAME ULTRA CORE
short_description: SNAKE GAME ULTRA CORE is an arena shooter where you play as a snake with a shotgun, escaping from a laboratory and seeking revenge on your enemies.
detailed_description:
In SNAKE GAME ULTRA CORE, you control a massive snake with a shotgun, destroying soldiers and causing chaos. Eat enemies, grow in size, and get revenge on anyone standing in your way!

Key Features:

An arena shooter with unique gameplay as a snake with a shotgun.

Exciting battles with numerous enemies and chaos.

A growth system where the snake gets bigger by eating enemies.

Diverse levels and locations for destruction.

Combos between shooting and eating enemies for maximum devastation.
